reason_training_not_allowed: Protocol/Gate-0 is not frozen yet. User requested scheme/protocol first; no training before freeze.

repo.default_model_name_warning: main.py defaults to clean_vib; every PANDA run must explicitly pass --model_name FTmodel.

data_policy.test_may_be_used_only_for: final confirmatory evaluation after primary config is frozen by three-seed val

source_audit_facts: OpenPrompt fields are generated by dataloaders but dropped by clipdata2gpu before PANDA.forward.
Current text/image/fusion expert gates use task_num=2 and forward hardcodes index 0; they are not 9-domain experts.
PAD/GNS uses hard top-k source indices; DCA is late static prompt-to-prompt bias.
Trainer.test reports final metrics only; branch/flip/selector diagnostics require dedicated export tools.
R5-A image projection is No-Go; aux_weight_2p0 is only a new candidate signal/control anchor.
R5-A smoke did not enable selection_margin/regret/route_balance losses; observed effects mainly concern final BCE + reconstruction + auxiliary BCE training dynamics.
PANDA checkpoints store model state_dict only, selected by val Macro-F1; optimizer/scheduler state is not retained.
gate0_goal: Before any training, verify that auxiliary supervision signals plausibly affect branch-to-final alignment and define exact smoke variants/controls.
gate0_allowed_inputs: Weibo-21 seed42 train/val metadata and frozen/common exports
gate0_forbidden_inputs: post-hoc variant selection using test metrics

feasible_a: primary val Macro-F1 and accuracy are not below deterministic_train_l0
target improvement is at least +0.003 absolute on Macro-F1 and accuracy when possible
primary beats best static aux/control family
at least two support metrics among ECE/Brier/HCE/weak-domain do not degrade
random/shuffled/same-budget controls do not match the primary
feasible_b: core mechanism signal exists but final gain is weak or control moat is incomplete
may be retained as diagnostic, ablation, or second-stage fallback

no_go_rule: primary below deterministic_train_l0 on final Macro-F1 or accuracy
primary not above best static aux/control variant
only calibration or conflict telemetry improves
random aux, shuffled branch labels, or same-budget controls match the gain
any later seed validation falls below deterministic after promotion

checkpoint_lifecycle.no_go_cleanup: delete smoke checkpoints; keep manifest, summary, flip audit, telemetry, notes
checkpoint_lifecycle.long_term_keep_allowed_only_if: candidate becomes Primary-Candidate after all active candidates are gated and deep-validated

promotion_rule: Do not run smoke until this manifest is reviewed and status changes from DRAFT_NOT_FROZEN to FROZEN_GATE0.
If R6-A Gate-0 is Blocked or No-Go, switch immediately to the next registered candidate.
If R6-A is Feasible-A/B, mark it and continue Gate-0 for every other active candidate.
Only after all active candidates finish Gate-0 may Feasible candidates enter smoke.
Only after all smoke runs finish may one candidate be selected for three-seed val.
Confirmatory test remains locked until three-seed val freezes the primary config.
